import { useState } from 'react' import { ChevronDownIcon, MagnifyingGlassIcon } from '@heroicons/react/20/solid' client/src/components/SearchResult.js export default function SearchPage() { const [dropdownOpen, setDropdownOpen] = useState(false) const [selectedCategory, setSelectedCategory] = useState("All categories") const [searchResults, setSearchResults] = useState([]) const toggleDropdown = () => { setDropdownOpen(!dropdownOpen) } const handleCategorySelect = (category) => { setSelectedCategory(category) setDropdownOpen(false) } const handleSearch = (e) => { e.preventDefault() const exampleResults = [ { _id: '6721cabe128cbf188ae5fd1a', Destination: 'Venice', Region: 'Veneto', Country: 'Italy', Category: 'City', Latitude: 45.435559, Longitude: 12.336196, 'Approximate Annual Tourists': '10 million', Currency: 'Euro', 'Majority Religion': 'Roman Catholic', 'Famous Foods': 'Pizza, Pasta, Gelato', Language: 'Italian', 'Best Time to Visit': 'Spring (April-May) or Fall (Sept-Oct)', 'Cost of Living': 'Medium-high', Safety: 'Generally safe, but watch out for pickpockets', 'Cultural Significance': 'A unique city built on canals, known for its gondolas, Piazza San Marco, and historical architecture.', Description: 'An iconic city of water, renowned for romantic gondola rides and historic canals.', }, ] setSearchResults(exampleResults) } return (
